_comment: Canonical google_tool_event request body. Every event has redundant field names so the downstream workflow can't drop information. attendees and participants both contain the same recipient list. event_title and title are both filled. event_date and event_time are separate, but start_datetime/end_datetime also carry the full ISO datetime.

calender.description: Rolling out real-time XMPP push for buyleads to first 5% of seller cohort.

MOM.discussion_summary: Team aligned on the May 22 rollout date with a 5% canary cohort.
MOM.decisions: Proceed with phase-1 rollout on May 22; steering review locked for May 19.
